code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut j = n - 1
    mut ok = true
    while i < j
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(a)
        match string.byte_at(line, j)
        when Some(b)
          if a != b
            ok = false
          end
        when None
          ok = false
        end
      when None
        ok = false
      end
      i = i + 1
      j = j - 1
    end
    if ok
      println("YES")
    else
      println("NO")
    end
  when None
    println("YES")
  end
end
